thesis: SPY is in a strong negative gamma regime with spot pinned between major OI and gamma walls at 606 and 609. Dealer positioning amplifies moves in either direction, with a sharp positive gamma flip at 609/614 that could trigger outsized volatility if breached. The setup favors momentum and breakout strategies, with long premium structures preferred given elevated IV and the risk of sharp moves into expiry.
trade_idea: Buy the SPY 606/609 strangle expiring today (buy 606 put, buy 609 call), targeting a move outside the 606–609 range as negative gamma and OI concentration create a volatility pocket.
invalidation: A rapid mean reversion or pin at 606 into expiry, with realized volatility collapsing and spot failing to break out of the 606–609 range, would invalidate the thesis and favor premium sellers.
risks: Unexpected macro headline that reverses flows
Dealer hedging flows dampen instead of amplify moves
Market liquidity dries up, reducing realized volatility
